CustomField.description: Days after Opportunity.Subscription_Start_Date__c that billing for this line item begins. 0 = bill from day one; negative values are allowed for prepaid items. Used by downstream billing flows (not modeled in this org) and by ARR proration.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Offset (days) from subscription start before this line bills. 0 = day one.
CustomField.label: Billing Start Offset (Days)
